help_needed.label: Scheduler and executor auth
help_needed.need: Confirm LILYROO_EXECUTOR_BEARER_TOKEN or LILYROO_ADMIN_PASSWORD is available locally and as a GitHub Actions secret.
help_needed.unblocks: Scheduler dry-run, executor readiness capture, and execution history capture.

help_needed.label: Instagram business account ID
help_needed.need: Provide IG_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID for the Instagram account connected to the Lily Roo Facebook Page.
help_needed.unblocks: Instagram executor rows after the secret is pushed and readiness is recaptured.

help_needed.label: TikTok OAuth app values
help_needed.need: Provide TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY, TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET, and TIKTOK_REDIRECT_URI, then authorize the generated TikTok OAuth URL so TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN can be created.
help_needed.unblocks: TikTok upload-draft automation for the first ready TikTok asset.

help_needed.label: TikTok public-posting approval
help_needed.need: Confirm whether TikTok has approved direct public posting for Lily Roo.
help_needed.unblocks: Direct public TikTok posting; without approval, upload-draft mode remains the safest automated path.

help_needed.label: Facebook identity confirmation
help_needed.need: Confirm identity in Facebook/Meta for Page publishing if Meta still shows the Page publishing checkpoint.
help_needed.unblocks: The blocked Facebook executor row that hit the identity confirmation checkpoint.
